craft_profile.pov_distance: Close third-person anchored in protagonist's perceptions and calculations; reader accesses internal reasoning and modern-past comparisons while remaining slightly outside full emotional register to maintain tension about true capability. Selective interiority allows dramatic irony when protagonist's observations differ from surface reality.
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Varied deliberately: fragmented short sentences during shock/pain/action moments create urgency, longer flowing sentences during dream sequences and reflective passages create contemplative breathing room. Dialogue exchanges use tight back-and-forth blocks simulating real conversation pace.
craft_profile.paragraphing: Short paragraphs for dialogue exchanges and action beats, medium paragraphs for scene transitions, longer unbroken passages for internal reflection and worldbuilding. Scene breaks implied through location shifts and action rather than explicit markers.
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Characters speak in period-appropriate formal register with honorifics and face-saving politeness formulas. Speech carries character information through title usage and formal/informal address switching. Significant information delivered through conversation rather than narration, maintaining show-don't-tell principle.
craft_profile.description_method: Sensory-first: descriptions emerge through what protagonist perceives (light, heat, smell, texture) rather than objective inventory. Beauty revealed through protagonist reaction rather than direct enumeration. Environmental description minimal and functional, focusing on elements relevant to immediate action.
craft_profile.exposition_method: Embedded in action and character reflection rather than delivered directly. Historical context emerges through protagonist's internal considerations of what he already knows. Reader learns alongside confused protagonist without feeling lectured. World rules suggested through dream imagery before confirmed through reality.
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Multiple layered hooks per chapter: progressive tension escalation, character interest moments, plot advancement questions. Each section ends on both answered and new question. Major chapters end on cusp of action or mid-sentence rather than after resolution.
craft_profile.transition_method: Scene breaks marked by dash lines or implied through physical action. Temporal jumps handled via narrator statement (也不知过了多久) or action summary rather than explicit markers. Light changes used as perspective boundary markers in sensory-recovery sequences.

arc_function: Protagonist transitions from established competence to active participation in political intrigue. The protagonist navigates multiple romantic interests while managing the burden of knowing which characters will die and when.
dominant_engine: Medical competence demonstration as both social mobility catalyst and relationship-building device, combined with dramatic irony engine derived from protagonist's historical foreknowledge creating romantic tension and moral conflict around characters destined for imperial execution.

craft_profile.pov_distance: Close third-person anchored in protagonist with selective omniscience; reader experiences internal calculations, doubts, and dramatic irony awareness directly while other characters' motivations remain partially opaque. craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Varied length alternating between tension-building short declarative sentences during key revelations and longer compound passages for exposition, medical reasoning, and internal reflection. Dialogue exchanges typically use short turns while descriptive passages provide breathing room.
craft_profile.paragraphing: Dialogue-heavy scenes with action beats and single-line internal observations breaking up longer exposition. Emotional beats isolated in single lines to create pacing rhythm. Scene transitions marked by character exits/entrances and spatial movement.
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Subtext-driven exchanges where surface conversation carries relationship or political subtext. Character voice distinguished through formality levels matching status. Deflections and elaborate answers reveal character. Minimal dialogue tags during rapid exchange; repeated question patterns build tension.
craft_profile.description_method: Evaluative rather than neutral; beauty and competence described through protagonist's desire and foreknowledge not objective catalog. Medical observations focus on clinically relevant details. Sparse environmental description reserved for status signaling and atmosphere building.
craft_profile.exposition_method: Distributed through dialogue as protagonist explains to less knowledgeable audience, making exposition diegetic rather than intrusive. Historical context delivered through protagonist's foreknowledge recall. Internal monologue qualifies delivered information as character thought.
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter ends on psychological tension through unresolved emotional state, mystery hook through unexplained departure or arrival, or pivot point revelation rather than always requiring action cliffhanger. Opens mid-conversation when scene continuation serves pacing.
craft_profile.transition_method: Spatial movement through physical space (entering/exiting rooms, corridor traversal) marks scene transitions. Time passage indicated by meal context, accumulated physical details, or explicit markers. Horizontal separators mark major scene breaks. Ellipsis marks internal scene shifts.

craft_profile.pov_distance: Close third-person limited anchored to protagonist with strategic reasoning exposed but emotional interiority concealed; political exchanges maintain observational distance allowing readers to witness power dynamics without editorial commentary; Wu Zetian's thoughts reported as observed behavior rather than direct access

craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter opens with declarative accusation then unpacks reasoning retroactively; mid-chapter shifts to lighter character interaction hook; ends on romantic foreshadowing hook or rhetorical question creating immediate need to see response; single declarative sentences create maximum impact without elaboration
craft_profile.transition_method: Sharp contrast from heavy political content to light personal scene; physical movement (leaving gates, arriving at location) marks scene shifts; time markers explicit for major jumps; blank line breaks between major scene shifts; scene anchored by physical setting and formal ritual providing structural continuity
